about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Technology has fascinated me since childhood, and I have never stopped learning and trying to help businesses grow.
about.journeyText: Since graduating from college, I have worked in large corporations, but always with an entrepreneurial mindset. I keep learning new technologies that can help solve problems quickly, affordably, and effectively. My experience has taken me through several cities in Mexico and the United States, working with people from different cultures and backgrounds.
careerGoals: Lead innovative tech projects at a forward-thinking company
Contribute to open-source projects and developer community
Mentor junior developers and share knowledge through content
Explore cutting-edge technologies like AI/ML integration
